category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers entering the Myanmar market under MSTRD and MIC requirements.

title.en: China-to-Myanmar LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入缅甸：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入緬甸：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Myanmar MSTRD conformity requirements (MS/IEC 60598, MS/IEC 62560, MS/IEC 62471), MIC import permit requirements, energy efficiency programmes, and MPT wireless approvals versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与缅甸 MSTRD 符合性要求（MS/IEC 60598、MS/IEC 62560、MS/IEC 62471）、MIC 进口许可要求、能效计划及 MPT 无线许可差距对照，与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與緬甸 MSTRD 符合性要求（MS/IEC 60598、MS/IEC 62560、MS/IEC 62471）、MIC 進口許可要求、能效計劃及 MPT 無線許可差距對照，與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, regulatory authority assessment, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Myanmar regulatory frameworks for electrical products are evolving; standards are largely voluntary and conformity documentation requirements may vary by product category and import channel. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current MSTRD, MIC, and MPT requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、监管机构评审、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。缅甸电气产品监管框架正在发展完善中；标准大多为自愿性，符合性文件要求因产品类别和进口渠道而异。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行 MSTRD、MIC 及 MPT 要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、監管機構評審、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。緬甸電氣產品監管框架正在發展完善中；標準大多為自願性，符合性文件要求因產品類別和進口渠道而異。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行 MSTRD、MIC 及 MPT 要求。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer entering Myanmar should prepare MSTRD conformity documentation referencing MS/IEC 60598 (luminaire safety) and MS/IEC 62560 (self-ballasted LED lamps); ensure products meet Myanmar's 230 V / 50 Hz grid (note: China's nominal voltage is 220 V — the 10 V difference may require verification); obtain an MIC import permit if required under the relevant HS code; seek MPT type approval for any smart or wireless-enabled luminaire; note that Myanmar has no horizontal RoHS law and no mandatory energy labelling scheme as of 2026 — these rows are mapped as absent; and note that Myanmar standards are largely voluntary with conformity documentation serving primarily as a customs and trade facilitation tool rather than a market prohibition trigger.
answer_first.zh: 进入缅甸市场的中国 LED 灯具制造商应：准备符合 MS/IEC 60598（灯具安全）和 MS/IEC 62560（自镇流 LED 灯）的 MSTRD 符合性文件；确保产品适配缅甸 230 V / 50 Hz 电网（注意：中国额定电压为 220 V，10 V 差异可能需要核验）；如相关 HS 编码要求，须取得 MIC 进口许可；智能或无线灯具须向 MPT 申请型号许可；注意截至 2026 年缅甸无横向 RoHS 法规及强制能效标签方案——相应行映射为不适用；并注意缅甸标准大多为自愿性，符合性文件主要作为海关和贸易便利化工具，而非市场禁入依据。
answer_first.zht: 進入緬甸市場的中國 LED 燈具製造商應：準備符合 MS/IEC 60598（燈具安全）和 MS/IEC 62560（自鎮流 LED 燈）的 MSTRD 符合性文件；確保產品適配緬甸 230 V / 50 Hz 電網（注意：中國額定電壓為 220 V，10 V 差異可能需要核驗）；如相關 HS 編碼要求，須取得 MIC 進口許可；智能或無線燈具須向 MPT 申請型號許可；注意截至 2026 年緬甸無橫向 RoHS 法規及強制能效標籤方案——相應行映射為不適用；並注意緬甸標準大多為自願性，符合性文件主要作為海關和貿易便利化工具，而非市場禁入依據。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag. Myanmar MSTRD standards adoption status and MIC permit categories must be re-verified on each review cycle as the regulatory framework is actively evolving.
